title: Clause Lens
subtitle: Insurance Policy Clause Extractor
problem: Insurance policies are dense PDFs — extracting coverage facts, exclusions, and limits manually is slow, inconsistent, and error-prone.
description: TypeScript/Node.js RAG pipeline that ingests policy PDFs, chunks clauses, extracts structured coverage facts with Claude, and serves semantic search over PostgreSQL + pgvector.
built: Full pipeline: PDF ingest, clause chunking & classification, concurrent Claude JSON extraction, embeddings, pgvector cosine search, labeled eval benchmark, and a built-in web UI.
longDescription: Clause Lens ingests insurance policy PDFs, extracts structured coverage facts using Claude, and serves semantic search over PostgreSQL + pgvector — with upload, search, and evaluation UI.
outcome: End-to-end policy analyzer with retrieval accuracy targets above 80% and field-level extraction scoring on a labeled benchmark set.

title: Ingoboka Platform
subtitle: Digital Microinsurance PWA
problem: Microinsurance products need a mobile-first, accessible frontend for citizens to browse coverage and complete flows without heavy native apps.
description: Next.js 14 progressive web app for a digital microinsurance platform — citizen-facing UI, modern UX, and production-ready frontend architecture.
built: Next.js 14 App Router PWA with TypeScript, responsive layouts, and API-driven insurance workflows designed for real-world deployment.
longDescription: Ingoboka is the frontend for a digital microinsurance platform — a Next.js 14 PWA built for accessibility, performance, and scalable citizen-facing insurance journeys.
outcome: Production-grade PWA frontend ready to integrate with insurance backend services.

title: ArcFace Face Recognition
subtitle: 5-Point Alignment + ONNX Inference
problem: Face recognition systems often depend on GPU infrastructure — needed an accurate CPU-first pipeline for enrollment and verification.
description: CPU-first face recognition pipeline using ArcFace ONNX models with 5-point facial alignment for robust identity matching.
built: Python pipeline: face detection, landmark alignment, ONNX ArcFace inference, embedding comparison, and enrollment/verification workflow.
longDescription: Production-oriented face recognition using ArcFace ONNX on CPU — 5-point alignment, embedding extraction, and identity verification without requiring a GPU.
outcome: Portable face recognition stack suitable for edge and server deployment.

title: WASAC & REG Unified Billing
subtitle: Enterprise Java Billing Backend
problem: Water and electricity postpaid billing required automated unified invoicing across WASAC and REG systems.
description: Automated Java backend for WASAC & REG unified postpaid billing — built with Spring Boot for enterprise-grade reliability.
built: Spring Boot services for billing logic, customer accounts, invoice generation, and unified postpaid workflows.
longDescription: Enterprise billing backend unifying WASAC water and REG electricity postpaid billing with Spring Boot, structured domain models, and automated invoice processing.
outcome: Unified billing automation replacing manual cross-utility reconciliation.

title: BestBuy Electronics
subtitle: Full-Stack E-Commerce
problem: Electronics retail needed a modern storefront with a scalable backend for products, orders, and customer data.
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform — React/TypeScript frontend and Next.js + Supabase backend for BestBuy Electronics.
built: Split repos: responsive React storefront with product catalog & checkout; Next.js API backend with Supabase for auth, inventory, and orders.
longDescription: Modern electronics e-commerce with a TypeScript React frontend and Next.js + Supabase backend — product management, cart, and order flows.
outcome: End-to-end online store with separated frontend/backend deployment.

title: ANPR — Plate Detection & OCR
subtitle: Automatic Number Plate Recognition
problem: Manual plate reading does not scale for parking, security, or traffic monitoring use cases.
description: End-to-end ANPR pipeline: plate detection, alignment, and OCR for automatic number plate recognition from images/video.
built: Python CV pipeline combining detection models, alignment, OCR, and structured plate text output (ANPR-Q11).
longDescription: ANPR-Q11 is a complete automatic number plate recognition project — detect plates, align regions, run OCR, and return structured results.
outcome: Working ANPR pipeline from raw images to readable plate strings.

title: AviaServe
subtitle: Airline Reservation System
problem: Airline booking flows need reliable search, seat selection, and reservation management across routes.
description: TypeScript airline reservation system for managing origins, destinations, schedules, and passenger bookings.
built: Full-stack TypeScript application with route search, booking logic, and reservation management.
longDescription: AviaServe handles airline reservations — search flights between origins and destinations, manage bookings, and persist reservation data.
outcome: Complete reservation workflow for multi-route airline scenarios.

title: ArnShop Full Stack
subtitle: Java + React E-Commerce
problem: Needed a complete e-commerce system with a modern web frontend and robust Java backend for electronics retail.
description: Full-stack e-commerce — React frontend with Java backend for product catalog, cart, checkout, and order management.
built: React client connected to Java REST services with MySQL persistence, inventory controls, and admin order management.
longDescription: ArnShop Full Stack combines a React storefront with a Java backend — full shopping cart, product catalog, and order workflows.
outcome: Production-style e-commerce split across modern frontend and Java API layer.

title: Face Tracker Live Dashboard
subtitle: AI + IoT Recognition System
problem: Live environments need face recognition tied to hardware actuators with a real-time monitoring dashboard.
description: PC-based face recognition and tracking with ESP32 integration and a live dashboard for monitoring detections.
built: Python recognition stack, MQTT/device integration, and a dashboard for live tracking events.
longDescription: Combines face recognition on PC with ESP32 hardware and a live dashboard — recognition, tracking, and IoT event streaming.
outcome: Integrated CV + IoT demo suitable for access control and monitoring prototypes.

title: MongoDB Transaction Manager
subtitle: ACID Transactions Demo
problem: Multi-document updates in MongoDB require transactions to stay consistent — needed a clear reference implementation.
description: Demonstrates MongoDB multi-document ACID transactions in Node.js for reliable financial-style updates.
built: Node.js service with MongoDB session-based transactions, rollback handling, and example transfer workflows.
longDescription: Reference implementation for MongoDB transaction management — sessions, commit/abort, and multi-collection consistency.
outcome: Reusable pattern for transactional MongoDB operations in production APIs.

title: Handwriting Recognition AI
subtitle: CNN Machine Learning Model
problem: Classifying handwritten digits manually does not scale — needed a trained model for automated recognition.
description: CNN in TensorFlow to classify handwritten digits and text from labeled datasets with training and inference pipelines.
built: Python CNN: dataset preprocessing, model training, evaluation metrics, and inference on new samples.
longDescription: Machine learning project implementing CNN architecture for handwriting recognition with documented accuracy improvements.
outcome: Working classifier with extensible training pipeline.

title: Web Scraping Pipeline
subtitle: Python Data Extraction
problem: Manual data collection from multi-page websites was slow and error-prone for analysis workflows.
description: Scrapes structured data from websites using Python and BeautifulSoup with multi-page crawl support.
built: Python pipeline: paginated crawling, HTML parsing, record normalization, and JSON/CSV export.
longDescription: Web scraping project using BeautifulSoup to extract structured datasets from multi-page sites for downstream analysis.
outcome: Automated extraction pipeline producing clean structured output.

title: MQTT Weather App
subtitle: IoT Weather Monitoring
problem: Weather sensor data was scattered across devices with no unified real-time view or reliable ingestion path.
description: IoT weather monitoring using MQTT pub/sub — Python Flask backend receives sensor data and serves a live dashboard.
built: Flask API subscribing to MQTT topics, processing payloads, and exposing a live weather dashboard. Dockerized.
longDescription: Weather station monitoring via MQTT — Flask backend ingests sensor readings and displays real-time environmental data.
outcome: Live MQTT pub/sub pipeline with working environmental dashboard.

title: Print Text Scanner
subtitle: OCR Desktop + Web App
problem: Extracting text from scanned documents and images required a unified tool for desktop and web users.
description: OCR application with desktop and web interfaces for scanning, extracting, and exporting text from images and PDFs.
built: Python OCR engine with GUI and web frontends, image preprocessing, and export to text formats.
longDescription: Comprehensive OCR app — scan documents, run recognition, and export text via desktop or web UI.
outcome: Dual-interface OCR tool for document digitization workflows.

title: ArnLibrary
subtitle: Library Management System
problem: Small libraries needed a simple system to track books, students, and borrowing without complex enterprise software.
description: Java library management system with book records, student records, and GUI for borrowing operations.
built: Java Swing GUI with MySQL persistence for books, students, due dates, and admin operations.
longDescription: Library Management System in Java — inventory, student borrowing, due dates, and admin panel.
outcome: End-to-end library workflow with CRUD operations.

title: BFS & DFS Algorithms
subtitle: Graph Traversal Implementation
problem: Understanding graph traversal strategies for pathfinding and connected-component problems.
description: Java implementations of Breadth-First Search and Depth-First Search with graph representation and analysis.
built: Java BFS/DFS with adjacency structures, traversal logic, and performance comparison.
longDescription: Educational graph traversal project implementing BFS and DFS with visualization and analysis.
outcome: Correct, tested traversal implementations demonstrating algorithm trade-offs.
